evals.prompt: 我的Pod一直处于CrashLoopBackOff状态，如何排查？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl get pods识别异常Pod，执行kubectl describe和kubectl logs命令分析问题，提供自动修复建议

evals.prompt: My Pod keeps restarting with CrashLoopBackOff status, how to troubleshoot?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl get pods to identify abnormal Pod, run kubectl describe and kubectl logs commands to analyze the issue, and provide automatic fix recommendations

evals.prompt: 我的Service创建成功但无法访问，如何排查？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl get svc和kubectl describe svc命令检查Service配置，执行kubectl get endpoints检查后端Pod，提供自动修复建议

evals.prompt: Service is created but cannot be accessed, how to troubleshoot?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl get svc and kubectl describe svc commands to check Service configuration, run kubectl get endpoints to check backend Pods, and provide automatic fix recommendations

evals.prompt: 我的Pod处于Pending状态，一直无法调度，如何排查？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl describe pod、kubectl get resourcequota和kubectl describe node命令分析资源问题，提供自动修复建议

evals.prompt: Pod is stuck in Pending status and cannot be scheduled, how to troubleshoot?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl describe pod, kubectl get resourcequota, and kubectl describe node commands to analyze resource issues, and provide automatic fix recommendations

evals.prompt: Pod被OOMKilled，如何解决？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl describe pod和kubectl top pod命令检查内存使用，分析内存限制问题，提供自动修复建议

evals.prompt: Pod is OOMKilled, how to resolve?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl describe pod and kubectl top pod commands to check memory usage, analyze memory limit issues, and provide automatic fix recommendations

evals.prompt: 健康检查失败导致Pod重启，如何排查？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl describe pod和kubectl logs命令检查健康检查配置，分析健康检查失败原因，提供自动修复建议

evals.prompt: Health check failures causing Pod restarts, how to troubleshoot?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl describe pod and kubectl logs commands to check health check configuration, analyze health check failure causes, and provide automatic fix recommendations

evals.prompt: RBAC权限拒绝错误，如何解决？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl auth can-i、kubectl get role和kubectl get rolebinding命令检查权限配置，分析权限问题，提供自动修复建议

evals.prompt: RBAC permission denied errors, how to resolve?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl auth can-i, kubectl get role, and kubectl get rolebinding commands to check permission configuration, analyze permission issues, and provide automatic fix recommendations

evals.prompt: Pod无法解析域名，DNS问题如何排查？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl exec nslookup和kubectl get svc kube-dns命令检查DNS配置，分析DNS解析问题，提供自动修复建议

evals.prompt: Pod cannot resolve domain names, how to troubleshoot DNS issues?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl exec nslookup and kubectl get svc kube-dns commands to check DNS configuration, analyze DNS resolution issues, and provide automatic fix recommendations

evals.prompt: HPA自动扩展不工作，如何排查？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl get hpa、kubectl describe hpa和kubectl get pods metrics-server命令检查HPA配置，分析扩展问题，提供自动修复建议

evals.prompt: HPA auto-scaling not working, how to troubleshoot?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl get hpa, kubectl describe hpa, and kubectl get pods metrics-server commands to check HPA configuration, analyze scaling issues, and provide automatic fix recommendations

evals.prompt: k3s集群Pod处于CrashLoopBackOff状态，如何排查？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl get pods识别异常Pod，执行kubectl describe和kubectl logs命令分析问题，提供自动修复建议（支持k3s）

evals.prompt: k3s cluster Pod in CrashLoopBackOff status, how to troubleshoot?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl get pods to identify abnormal Pod, run kubectl describe and kubectl logs commands to analyze the issue, and provide automatic fix recommendations (supports k3s)

evals.prompt: k3s服务无法访问，如何排查？
evals.expected_output: 自动执行kubectl get svc和kubectl describe svc命令检查Service配置，执行kubectl get endpoints检查后端Pod，提供自动修复建议（支持k3s）

evals.prompt: k3s service cannot be accessed, how to troubleshoot?
evals.expected_output: Automatically execute kubectl get svc and kubectl describe svc commands to check Service configuration, run kubectl get endpoints to check backend Pods, and provide automatic fix recommendations (supports k3s)
